_comment: process.env feature-flag governance allowlist (SD-LEO-INFRA-ACTIVATE-FEATURE-FLAG-001 / FR-4). Each key is a feature-flag-shaped env var that is governed: either registered in leo_feature_flags, or a justified non-flag exception. Advisory-first; CI does not block on un-allowlisted entries until --enforce is enabled. Add new env-var feature flags to leo_feature_flags (via scripts/enroll-env-var-feature-flags.mjs) AND list them here with a reason.

allow.BRAINSTORM_PRE_CHECK_ENABLED: Pre-existing process.env feature flag captured in the FR-4 baseline (SD-LEO-INFRA-ACTIVATE-FEATURE-FLAG-001); governed via allowlist pending registry-enrollment triage. New env-var feature flags must be enrolled in leo_feature_flags AND listed here.
allow.CLEANUP_AUTO_SAFE_ENABLED: Pre-existing process.env feature flag captured in the FR-4 baseline (SD-LEO-INFRA-ACTIVATE-FEATURE-FLAG-001); governed via allowlist pending registry-enrollment triage. New env-var feature flags must be enrolled in leo_feature_flags AND listed here.

allow.COORD_ADAM_REVIEW_V1: Registered in leo_feature_flags (coordinator↔Adam review lane); enrolled by SD-LEO-INFRA-ACTIVATE-FEATURE-FLAG-001.
allow.COORD_REVIEW_EVERY: Registered in leo_feature_flags (coordinator review cadence threshold); enrolled by SD-LEO-INFRA-ACTIVATE-FEATURE-FLAG-001.
allow.COORD_REVIEW_MIN_INTERVAL_HOURS: Min-interval floor (hours) on the coordinator/Adam review trigger so the every-N-SD gate doesn't over-fire in a heavy build stretch (SD-LEO-INFRA-BIDIRECTIONAL-REVIEW-MININTERVAL-001); numeric tuning sibling of COORD_REVIEW_EVERY, default 6.
